description: Express app directly calling lodash _.template() with user-supplied input, triggering CVE-2021-23337 prototype pollution RCE via crafted template strings.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.js directly calls _.template(req.body.template) with untrusted user input from POST body

findings.human_justification: _.template() is called directly in the /render POST route handler with user-controlled req.body.template, making the prototype pollution RCE vulnerability exploitable.
